executions.thesis: US market was inside regular hours at execution (09:35 EDT / 21:35 HKT). Existing UNH position was quoted around $434.70, above the $402.24 hard stop and below Target 1 at $444.58, so neither stop-loss nor profit-taking rules were triggered. SPY and QQQ opened slightly below prior close while VIX remained below the 22 risk threshold near 17.35; this supports holding the active position but does not justify adding exposure. AEHR and semiconductor-style candidates did not have confirmed regular-session close, volume expansion, and breakout evidence at the market-open decision point. Maintain the existing 18-share UNH simulation position and preserve 92% cash.

executions.thesis: UNH Setup A (Post-Earnings Momentum) fully validated. Day-0 (7/16) reaction: +1.16% gap, 2.27x volume expansion (13.28M vs 5.84M avg), close in top 25% of daily range ($452.68 vs $420.37-$461.62 range). Q2 EPS $6.38 vs $4.85 est (+31.5% beat), revenue $112.03B vs $110.81B, raised FY guidance to $19.50-$20.00. Analyst upgrades: Morgan Stanley $529 (Overweight), BofA $512 (Buy). NFLX eliminated due to negative earnings reaction (-11.78% premarket, weak Q2 guidance). Market regime: 2/4 conditions (S&P above 20DMA, VIX<22) — mixed but not bearish. Entry at day-0 close $423.41 with 5% stop at $402.24.
executions.reason: Setup A criteria fully met. Strong earnings catalyst with volume confirmation and technical follow-through. Acceptable R/R with 5% stop vs 10% target.
executions.review: First trade of simulation. EOD 7/17: UNH closed at $426.09 (+0.64% from entry, +$48.24 USD / +HK$376). Position remains well above stop ($402.24). No partial profit-taking triggered — Target 1 ($444.58, +5%) not yet reached. Plan: continue holding into next session; reassess if Target 1 hit or if market regime deteriorates.

executions.thesis: US market was inside regular hours at execution. Prior day S&P 500 closed +0.38% at 7,572.40 and Nasdaq Composite +0.62% at 26,269.23, with VIX still below the 22 risk threshold. However, the market-open tape was mixed: chip and memory stocks were under pressure after weakness in SK Hynix/Samsung, while the main scheduled catalysts were UnitedHealth, U.S. Bancorp, and Netflix earnings. Netflix reports after the close, so it is not a valid market-open post-earnings setup. UnitedHealth may have an earnings-related move, but no confirmed +4% day-0 reaction with volume expansion was available at execution. U.S. Bancorp did not show a confirmed +3% to +9% catalyst breakout with 2x volume and 20-day-high confirmation. No Setup A or Setup B met the rules with reward-to-risk >= 2.0, so capital is preserved.
executions.reason: No valid setup confirmed at market open. Available evidence did not verify required earnings momentum, volume expansion, breakout above 20-day high, or acceptable reward-to-risk.
executions.review: Continue to monitor post-close Netflix earnings and any confirmed follow-through in health care, banks, or semiconductors for the next regular-hours decision. No Telegram message sent because workflow was not blocked.
